author: raulvk
content:
hm, on the getBlobsV3 Geth perf investigation. i suspect this trace is a red herring: on surface it looks like serialization is the hotspot. but i think what's lurking underneath is series of page faults that end up hitting disk because Go KV stores return mmap'ped slices.

this would also explain the high variability we're seeing across calls with same/similar blob counts. as a next step, i would take a cpu profile -- that will get to the bottom. pinging <@209113407750799360> <@1057495364564946944> <@857052906495017000>
